ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procedure */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who underwent the procedure */,
  "procedure_name" TEXT /* Name of the procedure */,
  "datePerformed" TEXT /* Date the procedure was performed */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who performed the procedure */,
  "procedure_description" TEXT /* Description of the procedure */,
  "procedure_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the procedure */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procedures_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procedures_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the provider (e.g., surgeon, primary care physician) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the provider (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  "credentials" TEXT /* Credentials of the provider (e.g., medical degree, certifications) */,
  "affiliations" TEXT /* Affiliations of the provider (e.g., hospitals, clinics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who received the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnosis */,
  "dateDiagnosed" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosis_description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who is taking the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage instructions for the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication */,
  "indications" TEXT /* Indications for the medication */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Potential side effects of the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "lab_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who received the lab result */,
  "lab_test_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab test */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the lab result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the lab result was received */,
  "lab_test_description" TEXT /* Description of the lab test */,
  "reference_range" TEXT /* Reference range for the lab test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, administrator, researcher) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the user (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource that was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., medical record, image, document) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_providers" (
  "patient_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-provider relationship */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., primary care physician, specialist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_providers_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_providers_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medication_administrations" (
  "medication_administration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication administration record */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication */,
  "administration_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was administered */,
  "administration_time" TEXT /* Time the medication was administered */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the medication administration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_administration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medication_administrations_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_result_flags" (
  "lab_result_flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result flag */,
  "lab_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab result */,
  "flag_type" TEXT /* Type of flag (e.g., critical, abnormal) */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_result_flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_result_flags_lab_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_result_id") REFERENCES lab_results ("lab_result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medication_interactions" (
  "medication_interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication interaction */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication */,
  "interacting_medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interacting medication */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., major, moderate) */,
  "interaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medication_interactions_interacting_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("interacting_medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medication_interactions_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id")
)
